title: CRISPR Off-Target Effects
script_summary: Exploring the off-target effects of CRISPR technology and the ongoing research for more precise gene editing.

segments.voiceover: Did you know CRISPR can cut the wrong genes?
This happens when gene editors target unintended DNA locations.
Imagine the consequences: unintended mutations could lead to serious issues.
Researchers are actively testing and engineering CRISPR for higher specificity.
With advancements, we can reduce these off-target effects, making CRISPR safer.
Stay updated on CRISPR's journey. Like and follow for more science insights!
